name: dayonebuilder-resolver
description: Optional MCP adapter contract for agents that need to choose the best existing executor from static DayOneBuilder collections.

tools.name: dob_recommend_executor
tools.description: Given a task, fetch static collections and return the best source URL, first action, smoke test, proof signal, and fallback.

tools.name: dob_repo_report
tools.description: Given a GitHub owner/repo, return public GitHub signals and an agent action plan.

tools.name: dob_record_event
tools.description: Record a resolver adoption event such as collection_json_hit, install_snippet_copy, outbound_repo_click, or smoke_test_pass when telemetry is available.

trust_rules: Use static collections, upstream source URLs, GitHub public API, or authenticated cache as source of truth.
Do not invent route, click, copy, install, or smoke-test counters.
Prefer the best external executor when it beats a DayOneBuilder-owned option.
